phrases.intent_en: Which dock for Dodecanese island ferries
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι η προβλήτα για τα Δωδεκάνησα;
phrases.cultural_note: Greek ports typically have clearly marked signage for different ferry routes, with the Dodecanese islands dock often indicated by a specific sign.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end, on the left.

responses.english: At the end, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy a ticket to Bodrum here
phrases.text_local: Μπορώ να αγοράσω εισιτήριο για Bodrum εδώ;
phrases.cultural_note: International ferry routes like Kos to Bodrum typically have dedicated ticket offices at the port.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Dodecanese islands dock
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι η προβλήτα των Δωδεκανήσων;
phrases.cultural_note: Port signage in Greece is standardized, with all ferry docks for island routes clearly marked.

likely_response.translation_en: At the eastern edge of the port.

responses.english: At the eastern edge of the port.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Bodrum ferry ticket office
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το γραφείο εισιτηρίων για Bodrum;
phrases.cultural_note: In Greek ports, ticket agents for international ferry routes are typically located at designated counters near the main entrance or check-in area.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right of the entrance.

responses.english: To the right of the entrance.

phrases.cultural_note: Port facilities in Greek islands often have basic waiting areas without guaranteed air conditioning.

likely_response.local: Ναι, στο κεντρικό κτίριο, κοντά στα ταμεία.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the port waiting room in the main building is air-conditioned, near the Bodrum ticket counter.

responses.english: Yes, the port waiting room in the main building is air-conditioned, near the Bodrum ticket counter.
responses.local: Ναι, στο κεντρικό κτίριο, κοντά στα ταμεία.

phrases.intent_en: Is there an extra charge for bicycles
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry operators in Greece may charge extra for bicycle transport, but this is not always displayed at the ticket counter.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is an extra charge.

responses.english: Yes, there is an extra charge.

phrases.text_local: Πότε αναχωρεί το επόμενο πλοίο για το Μπόντρουμ;
phrases.cultural_note: Departure times are typically announced over the port's public address system in Greek ports.

likely_response.local: Σε μισή ώρα, από την αποβάθρα Τουρκίας.
likely_response.translation_en: In half an hour, from the Turkey pier.

responses.english: In half an hour, from the Turkey pier.
responses.local: Σε μισή ώρα, από την αποβάθρα Τουρκίας.
